targets.rawSql: SELECT NOW() as time, COUNT(*)::float as value FROM public.workflow_executions WHERE start_time > NOW() - interval '1 minute';

SELECT NOW() as time, COALESCE((SUM(CASE WHEN status='error' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)::float / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0)) * 100, 0) as value FROM public.workflow_executions WHERE start_time > NOW() - interval '5 minutes';
SELECT NOW() as time, COALESCE(AVG(duration_ms), 0)::float as value FROM public.workflow_executions WHERE start_time > NOW() - interval '5 minutes';
SELECT NOW() as time, COUNT(*)::float as value FROM public.workflow_executions WHERE status::text='processing';
SELECT execution_id::text, status::text, current_step::text, duration_ms, start_time, workflow_name FROM public.workflow_executions ORDER BY start_time DESC LIMIT 50;
SELECT status::text as label, COUNT(*)::float as value FROM public.workflow_executions WHERE start_time > NOW() - interval '5 minutes' GROUP BY status;
SELECT step_name::text as step, AVG(duration_ms)::float as value FROM public.workflow_steps GROUP BY step_name;
SELECT step_name::text as step, MAX(duration_ms)::float as value FROM public.workflow_steps GROUP BY step_name ORDER BY value DESC;
SELECT date_trunc('minute', start_time) as time, COUNT(*)::float as value FROM public.workflow_executions WHERE status::text='error' GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1;

SELECT error_type::text, error_severity::text as severity, COUNT(*)::float as count FROM public.workflow_executions WHERE status::text='error' GROUP BY error_type, error_severity ORDER BY count DESC LIMIT 10;
SELECT NOW() as time, COUNT(*)::float as value FROM public.system_events WHERE event_type LIKE '%auto_heal%' AND timestamp > NOW() - interval '1 hour';

title: GMM Command Center [SRE NOC] v6 - Hardened
